Oilseed Rape: (1) Regional areas for 2010 onwards have been replaced with the final regional breakdowns from the June Survey of Agriculture. Regional yields have been recalculated as a result, although any changes are very minor. National areas, national yields and all production figures remain unchanged. See metadata tab for further details.

(2) In 2024 Spring oilseed rape area and production figures for England between 2022 to 2008 were apportioned into the regions, producing regional data at the total oilseed rape level. From 2023 onwards Spring and Winter oilseed rape figures are produced as a combined total oilseed rape figure. See metadata tab for further details.

(3) In all years prior to 2022, production standardised to 9.0% moisture content for oilseed rape. From 2022 production only adjusted for farms that reported moisture content for oilseed rape above 9.0%. See metadata tab for further details
(4) Moisture content data for Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland are not available and as a result UK figures cannot be calculated.
